name: r62-internet-technology
description: JASYTI CompTIA Network+ study platform (Quartz + static study tools)

scripts.manifest: node scripts/generate-manifest.mjs && node scripts/generate-domain-indexes.mjs && node scripts/build-question-bank.mjs
scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-quartz-build.mjs && npm run manifest && cd quartz && npx quartz build -d ../content -o ../public && cd .. && node scripts/copy-study-static.mjs
scripts.serve: npm run build && cd quartz && npx quartz build -d ../content -o ../public --serve
